title: Communauté de communes du Sud Arrageois
summary: The Communauté de communes du Sud Arrageois was located in the Pas-de-Calais département, in northern France. It was created in January 1993. It was merged into the new Communauté de communes du Sud-Artois in January 2013.
text:
The Communauté de communes du Sud Arrageois was located in the Pas-de-Calais département, in northern France. It was created in January 1993. It was merged into the new Communauté de communes du Sud-Artois in January 2013.

Composition
It comprised the following 22 communes:
